biography: Psychologist-turned-developer with a passion for machine learning and web development. Leverages an understanding of human behavior to craft intuitive and engaging software solutions using diverse programming languages and frameworks.

experiences.title: Software Engineering Intern
experiences.description: Developed an interactive Gradio-based web application that enables users to annotate important areas on image data, enhancing the explainability and accuracy of DNNs using robust explanation supervision techniques like RES.

experiences.title: Software Engineering Intern
experiences.description: Enhanced user interface accessibility and cross-browser compatibility to deliver an intuitive and seamless online shopping experience.

experiences.title: Research Assistant
experiences.description: Collaborated closely with Emory faculty to co-author a research paper on music streaming data visualization, submitted to CSCW 2024. Utilized Python and D3.js to create interactive visualizations that effectively illustrate Spotify user behaviors and preferences.
